folio.label: 196v
folio.l: Me flemed wrecche , in this desert of galle
Thynke on the wo~man Cananee , that seide
That whelpes eten , so~me , of the cro~mes alle
That from hire lordes table , ben I falle
And thougú that I , vnworthy , Sone of Eue
Be synful , ©et accepte my byleue
¢ And for æ feitú , is detú , w outen werkes

note.notetxt: 64Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: So for to werkyn , ©eue me wyt & space
That I be quyt from thens , æ moost derk is
O æè that art so fair , and ful of grace
Be myn aduocate , in that heigú place
There as w outen ende , is songe Osanne
Thow Cristes moder , dougúter deere of Anne
¢ And of thy ligút , my soule in prisou~ ligúte

note.notetxt: 71Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: That troubled is , by the cogitaciou~
Of my body , and also by the wigúte
Of erthely lust , and fals affecciou~
O hauene of refuyt , o sauaciou~
Of hem , æ ben in sorwe , & in distresse
Now helpe , for to my werke , I wol me dresse
¢ ñet preye I ©ow , that reden that I wryte

note.notetxt: 78Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: For©eue me , that I do no diligence
This ilke storie , subtilly to endite
For bothe haue I , the wordes & sentence
Of hi~ , that at the Seyntes reuerence
The storie wrot , and folwen hire legende
And preye ©ow , æ ©e wole my werk amende
¢ First wolde I ©ow , the name of Seynt Cecelie

note.notetxt: 85Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Expoune , as men moun in hire storie se
It is to seyn on englissú , heuenes lilie
For pure chastnesse , of virginite
Or for she whitnesse hadde , of honestee
And grene of conscience , and of good fame
The swote sauour , lilie was hire name
¢ Or Cecile is to seyn , the weye to blynde

note.notetxt: 92Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: For she ensaumple was , by good techynge
Or ellis Cecile , as I wretyn fynde
Is ioyned , by a maner , conioynynge
Of heuene and lia , and here in figurynge
The heuene is set , for thougút of holynesse
And lia , for hire lastynge bysinesse
¢ Cecile , may eke be seid , in this manere

note.notetxt: 99Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Wantyng of blyndnesse , for hire grete ligút
